lesson.title: Foundational Cooking Skills
lesson.description: This lesson covers essential cooking techniques for beginners, including boiling, sautéing, and knife skills.

steps.instruction: Gather all necessary tools and ingredients for the lesson.
Learn how to properly hold a knife and practice basic chopping techniques.
Understand the importance of kitchen safety and hygiene.
Practice boiling water and learn how to season it for cooking.
Sauté vegetables and learn about heat control.
